name: Gonka Cost Optimizer

skills.name: Cost Analysis & Savings Calculator

Calculates exact $ savings switching to Gonka Network (6,800x+ cheaper than OpenAI, live pricing updated every 10 min). Returns: monthly savings, annual savings, cost ratio, signup link with 12M nGNK free bonus.
